final:
module top_module(
  input [31:0] x,
  input [31:0] y,
  output reg [31:0] modulus_result // Changed to reg type
);// Always block to calculate the modulus_result
  always @(*) begin
    if (y == 0) begin
      modulus_result = 0; // Return 0 if y is 0
    end else begin
      modulus_result = x - (x / y) * y; // Calculate the modulus_result
    end
  end

endmodule
